verses.text: In a word, what the soul is in the body, that are the Christians in the world.
The soul is spread throughout all the members of the body, and Christians throughout the divers cities of the world.
The soul hath its abode in the body, and yet is not of the body.
So Christians have their abode in the world, and yet are not of the world.

section: The Relation of Christians to the World
